post.subject: the end
post.body:
For those who care, I would like to let you know that this is most likely going to be the end of the road for this livejournal account; and my relationship with livejournal altogether. Its been fun. But times have most certainly changed.

I do actively blog on my own website and if like you can head over and have a look, maybe even bookmark.

Iced Coffee Photoblog

Iced Coffee Words


To those I dont talk to often anymore. I wish you all the best.
